title: Sound infusion device and method
abstract: A system for delivering harmonic frequency by direct contact for therapeutic purposes for the treatment of tissue, such as hard and soft tissue, muscles, nerves, and scar tissue. The apparatus uses a sound infusion table and optionally smaller pads with a sound amplifier to flexibly treat the whole body or a specific site in a non-invasive manner. The system, delivers harmonic frequency to the body or a specific location through direct contact with the body or specific locations, such as joints, feet, lungs, and thighs.
